column1: __________, I know the idea crossed your mind.
I ________ would have figured it out myself if you hadn't tipped me off.
He was just homesick, but _______ they couldn't see it that way.
She ________forgot it's the opening and made another date.
__________, it’s not his car. It’s mine.
She looks very young, but she’s _____about 40. That’s be­cause she does a lot of sport.
_________, I don’t re­mem­ber him quite well.
The situation is very bad. No one can ______help me.
